title: BetterCreaking
description: The Pale Garden as it should be. A scary and dangerous biome
body:
# Better Creaking

#### Features:
* Added an anger mechanic that makes creakings deal more damage and become faster after you hit them or they hit you
* Disabled the creaking hearts crafting recipe
* Forced moody brightness and night in the pale garden
* The creaking is now the only mob that can spawn in the pale garden
* Added a looking detector: The resin sensor!
* Fireproofed the pale garden
* Disabled pale oak leave collisions
* Added ambient sounds
